title: Falling Blocks Anim
description: This mod adds animation for falling blocks
body:
![Falling Blocks Anim](https://bobophones.github.io/img/logo/fba.png)

# This mod adds animation for falling blocks
Revives the mechanics of falling blocks by adding smooth rotation when falling. Sand, gravel, concrete and other blocks no longer just fall — they spin like real physical objects, creating a more dynamic picture of destruction.

![Explosion](https://bobophones.github.io/img/screenshot/fba_0.png)
